reference_module.title: Queues, Workflows, Workers AI and Vectorize

checklist.entry: Use Queues to decouple work, buffer or batch downstream calls, and guarantee delivery after a successful write.
Configure producers and consumers in Wrangler.
Use retries, delays and dead letter queues where failure handling matters.
Use Workflows for durable multi-step applications that need retries, persisted state, sleeps, waits or human-in-the-loop approval.
Do not model long-running multi-step processes as a single request handler when Workflow semantics are required.
Configure the AI binding in Wrangler or the dashboard.
Use env.AI.run(model, input) to run Workers AI models.
Use insert for new vector IDs and upsert where existing vectors may need updating.
Vectorize inserts are asynchronous and may take a few seconds to become queryable.
Keep embedding dimension, model and index configuration aligned.
